violations.text: Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 500 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Manual adjustment to be made until dispenser is properly adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
The floors in the warewashing area were observed in poor repair (paint observed chipped). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2027

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment to sanitize all dishes in 3 bay sink, until machine is properly adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the upstairs ice machine have an accumulation of black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
Bakery food prep sink observed leaking into bucket. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Ceiling in bakery observed in poor repair. Per PIC, repairs are in process. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
